message:
fix(cli,core): self-heal XDG path, AGENT_MAIL_URL in doctor fix/setup status, stale test

Three residual bugs from the recent config overhaul:

1. Self-heal path (`run_setup_self_heal_for_server`) still wrote tokens
   to project-local .env instead of XDG config.env, leaking bearer
   tokens into project directories. Now uses the same XDG path as
   the main `am setup run` command.

2. Doctor `fix` and `setup status` ignored AGENT_MAIL_URL env var when
   validating MCP config URLs, causing doctor fix to "repair" URLs
   back to the local bind address even when AGENT_MAIL_URL specified
   a different endpoint. Both now mirror the doctor `check` logic.

3. Test `default_http_host_is_wildcard` still asserted "0.0.0.0" after
   the default was changed to "127.0.0.1". Renamed to
   `default_http_host_is_loopback` with correct assertion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
